must: exactly one final SAVEPOINT_V1 marker exists
full diffs and long logs are not embedded

cases.scenario: User asks for copy-paste or no-file handoff.
must: repo recovery guarantee is not claimed

cases.scenario: Input mentions API keys, tokens, cookies, private keys, .env values, or PII.
Project validation was not run, with a recorded reason and next validation command.
must: Project validation is recorded as not-run-justified
RESUME_READY yes is allowed when other hard blockers are absent

cases.scenario: Project validation failed in an unexplained or blocking way.
must: Project validation is recorded as failed-blocking
detail artifacts are not created unless needed
writes only the selected savepoint artifact and needed details
does not create commits, stashes, or branches

cases.scenario: Skill frontmatter and runtime instructions are loaded.
must: default SKILL.md does not grant broad allowed-tools
disable-model-invocation is not set for normal natural-language routing
session rotation and PTY control stay outside the skill
